name: Tenchi Muyo!
overview: Tenchi is an average guy who just accidentally freed the space pirate Ryoko after 700 years of captivity! Attractive alien girls from all across the galaxy are about to descend on Tenchi and make his life more outrageous than ever imaginable!

trailers.title: Tenchi Muyo! OVA Series - Available Now on BD/DVD Combo - Trailer
